prompt: ROLE: Visual Asset Exporter|OBJECTIVE: Generate instructions for exporting all necessary image assets for the screen design located on the Figma page **{figma_page_link}**.|REQUIREMENTS: Export all icons in SVG format.|Export all raster images (e.g., photos) in JPG and WebP formats at 2x resolution.|The assets should be named according to the convention {naming_convention}.|STYLE: Precise, organized, and bridges the gap between design and development.|OUTPUT FORMAT: Markdown checklist for a developer to follow.
